package.title:
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1. TITLE
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Working Title : Echoes of the Forgotten City
  Tagline       : Some memories are worth fighting to reclaim.
  Genre         : Anime / Sci-Fi
  Audience      : Teen / Young Adult
package.characters:
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  3. CHARACTERS
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  ▸ KIRA (Protagonist, age 17)
    Appearance : Short silver hair, violet eyes, pale skin, wearing a worn leather jacket and cargo pants
    Personality: determined, empathetic, impulsive, resourceful
    Speech     : direct and passionate
    Arc        : Learns to trust others instead of facing every challenge alone

  ▸ REX (Supporting, age 19)
    Appearance : Tall build, dark brown hair, amber eyes, tan skin, wearing a grey hoodie
    Personality: calm, analytical, loyal, quietly humorous
    Speech     : measured and thoughtful
    Arc        : Overcomes his fear of failure to stand by Kira at the climax
package.scene_list:
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  4. SCENE LIST
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  #     Title                        Location                       Time       Mood                 Characters
  ───── ──────────────────────────── ────────────────────────────── ────────── ──────────────────── ────────────────────
  1     The Broken Skyline           Exterior — ruined city rooft   Dusk       melancholy, hopefu   KIRA
  2     Old Allies                   Interior — abandoned warehou   Night      tense, reunion       KIRA, REX
  3     The Memory Core              Interior — underground vault   Unknown    epic, triumphant     KIRA, REX
package.dialogue:
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  5. DIALOGUE
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  — Scene 1: The Broken Skyline —
  [00:00] NARRATOR: In the city where memories go to die, one girl refuses to forget.
  [00:10] KIRA: I'll find what they took from us. No matter the cost.

  — Scene 2: Old Allies —
  [00:45] REX: You came back. I wasn't sure you would.
  [00:50] KIRA: I need your help, Rex. There's no one else I can trust.
  [00:58] REX: Then tell me everything.

  — Scene 3: The Memory Core —
  [01:30] KIRA: This is it. Everything they erased — it's all here.
  [01:38] REX: Kira, once you open that core, there's no going back.
  [01:45] KIRA: Good. Because I'm done looking back.
  [02:10] NARRATOR: Some memories are worth every scar.

package.visual_prompts:
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  7. VISUAL PROMPTS
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  Scene 1 — The Broken Skyline:

    Wide establishing shot of a crumbling futuristic cityscape at
    dusk, KIRA standing at the edge of a rooftop, short silver
    hair blowing in the wind, violet eyes gazing at the horizon,
    worn leather jacket, anime cel-shaded style, warm orange and
    deep purple color palette, cinematic composition, high detail,
    melancholy atmosphere

  Scene 2 — Old Allies:

    Medium two-shot inside a dark warehouse lit by a single
    flickering bulb, KIRA facing REX, tension in their postures,
    KIRA: short silver hair, violet eyes, leather jacket; REX:
    tall, dark brown hair, amber eyes, grey hoodie, anime style,
    cool blue and amber contrast lighting, cinematic over-the-
    shoulder angle, high detail

  Scene 3 — The Memory Core:

    Wide shot inside a glowing underground vault filled with
    floating data spheres, KIRA reaching toward a pulsing core of
    light, REX standing behind her in support, KIRA: short silver
    hair lit by blue-white light, violet eyes wide with awe,
    leather jacket; REX: tall silhouette, amber eyes reflecting
    the glow, anime style, electric blue and white color palette,
    dramatic low angle, epic atmosphere, high detail, cinematic
    composition
package.audio_plan:
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  8. AUDIO PLAN
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  Music:
    Scene 1 — The Broken Skyline: ethereal ambient, slow tempo, fade in
    Scene 2 — Old Allies: tense underscore, mid tempo, sustained strings
    Scene 3 — The Memory Core: full orchestral, building to climax, 120 BPM

  Sound Effects (SFX):
    [00:00] Scene 1: wind howling, distant rumble
    [00:45] Scene 2: footsteps on concrete, flickering light buzz
    [01:30] Scene 3: humming machinery, energy surge, triumphant swell

  Voice-Over / Narration:
    [00:00] NARRATOR: In the city where memories go to die, one
      girl refuses to forget.
    [02:10] NARRATOR: Some memories are worth every scar.
package.assembly_plan:
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  9. ASSEMBLY PLAN
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  Editing Order:
    1. scene_1_the_broken_skyline.mp4  → [Cross-dissolve] →  scene_2_old_allies.mp4
    2. scene_2_old_allies.mp4  → [Cut] →  scene_3_the_memory_core.mp4
    3. scene_3_the_memory_core.mp4  (final scene)

  Export Settings:
    Resolution : 1920×1080
    Frame Rate : 24 fps
    Format     : MP4
    Codec      : H.264
    Audio      : AAC 48 kHz stereo
